name: Workday Sana Self-Service Agent
description: Enterprise AI platform with self-service agent for HR and finance operations. Includes 300+ pre-built skills for automating HR workflows, payroll, expense management, and finance processes. Sana is Workday's superintelligence for managing people, money, and agents.
pricing: Enterprise licensing (part of Workday Cloud suite)
notes: Launched March 17, 2026. Enterprise AI platform positioning Workday as agent-native ERP vendor. Sana interface available alongside traditional Workday UI. Over 300 pre-built agent skills for HR and finance.
